requirement_topic.en: IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 vs China GB/T 20234 Connector Incompatibility
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2与中国GB/T 20234接口不兼容
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2與中國GB/T 20234接口不相容

summary.en: Bahrain's electric vehicle charging infrastructure follows IEC 62196 connector standards: Type 2 (IEC 62196-2) for AC charging and CCS2 (Combined Charging System using Type 2 inlet with DC pins per IEC 62196-3) for DC fast charging. These connectors are physically and electrically incompatible with China's domestic EV charging connectors defined under GB/T 20234.1-2023 (general requirements), GB/T 20234.2-2015 (AC charging interface), and GB/T 20234.3-2023 (DC charging interface). A Chinese-market EV charger with GB/T 20234 connectors cannot charge IEC 62196-compliant vehicles used in Bahrain and cannot be sold in Bahrain without hardware redesign. This is the highest-priority technical gap for Chinese EV charger exporters targeting Bahrain.
summary.zh: 巴林电动汽车充电基础设施遵循IEC 62196接口标准：交流充电采用Type 2（IEC 62196-2），直流快充采用CCS2（组合充电系统，使用带直流插针的Type 2车辆插座，符合IEC 62196-3）。这些接口与中国国内电动汽车充电接口（GB/T 20234.1-2023通用要求、GB/T 20234.2-2015交流充电接口、GB/T 20234.3-2023直流充电接口）在物理和电气上均不兼容。采用GB/T 20234接口的中国市场充电设备无法为巴林在用的IEC 62196兼容车辆充电，在不更换硬件的情况下无法在巴林销售。这是中国充电设备出口商进入巴林市场的最高优先级技术差距。
summary.zht: 巴林電動汽車充電基礎設施遵循IEC 62196接口標準：交流充電採用Type 2（IEC 62196-2），直流快充採用CCS2（組合充電系統，使用帶直流插針的Type 2車輛插座，符合IEC 62196-3）。這些接口與中國國內電動汽車充電接口（GB/T 20234.1-2023通用要求、GB/T 20234.2-2015交流充電接口、GB/T 20234.3-2023直流充電接口）在物理和電氣上均不相容。採用GB/T 20234接口的中國市場充電設備無法為巴林在用的IEC 62196相容車輛充電，在不更換硬件的情況下無法在巴林銷售。這是中國充電設備出口商進入巴林市場的最高優先級技術差距。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-1:2022 (Plugs, socket-outlets, vehicle connectors and vehicle inlets — conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 1: General requirements)
IEC 62196-2:2022 (Part 2: Dimensional compatibility requirements for AC pin and contact-tube accessories)
IEC 62196-3:2022 (Part 3: Dimensional compatibility requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers)
GSO IEC 62893-1:2022 (EV charging cable standard adopted by Bahrain/GCC via BSMD)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.1-2023 (general requirements for conductive charging connection devices for electric vehicles), GB/T 20234.2-2015 (AC charging interface, 7-pin), and GB/T 20234.3-2023 (DC charging interface). These China-specific connectors are not compatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 or CCS2 used in Bahrain and most non-China markets.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB/T 20234.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电连接装置通用要求）、GB/T 20234.2-2015（交流充电接口，7针）和GB/T 20234.3-2023（直流充电接口）。这些中国专用接口与巴林及大多数非中国市场使用的IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB/T 20234.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電連接裝置通用要求）、GB/T 20234.2-2015（交流充電接口，7針）和GB/T 20234.3-2023（直流充電接口）。這些中國專用接口與巴林及大多數非中國市場使用的IEC 62196 Type 2或CCS2不相容。

gap.en: Hardware redesign is required. Chinese-market EV chargers must be re-engineered with IEC 62196-2 Type 2 connectors (AC) and IEC 62196-3 CCS2 connectors (DC fast charging) before they can be sold or installed in Bahrain. This is not a documentation gap — it is a physical product incompatibility that cannot be remedied by test reports or declarations alone.
gap.zh: 须进行硬件重新设计。中国市场充电设备须改装为IEC 62196-2 Type 2接口（交流）和IEC 62196-3 CCS2接口（直流快充），方可在巴林销售或安装。这不是文件差距，而是实物产品不兼容问题，无法仅凭测试报告或声明加以弥补。
gap.zht: 須進行硬件重新設計。中國市場充電設備須改裝為IEC 62196-2 Type 2接口（交流）和IEC 62196-3 CCS2接口（直流快充），方可在巴林銷售或安裝。這不是文件差距，而是實物產品不相容問題，無法僅憑測試報告或聲明加以彌補。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62196-compatible connectors are the de facto mandatory requirement for EV chargers in Bahrain under the 2025 MEWA EV charging framework; GB/T 20234 connectors are not compatible
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234.2-2015 and GB/T 20234.3-2023 are mandatory for China domestic EV charging connectors

source.publisher: Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD) / GSO — GSO IEC 62893-1:2022

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The GB/T 20234 connector family used in China is physically incompatible with IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 required in Bahrain. Hardware redesign is mandatory before any Chinese-market EV charger can be sold or installed in Bahrain. This is the single most critical gap to address before entering the Bahrain EV charger market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国使用的GB/T 20234接口系列与巴林要求的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2在物理上不兼容。任何中国市场充电设备在巴林销售或安装前必须进行硬件重新设计。这是进入巴林充电设备市场前须首先解决的最关键差距。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國使用的GB/T 20234接口系列與巴林要求的IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2在物理上不相容。任何中國市場充電設備在巴林銷售或安裝前必須進行硬件重新設計。這是進入巴林充電設備市場前須首先解決的最關鍵差距。
